sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104493" key="trago/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρᾰγό-πους</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n104493.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">goat-footed,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:133" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">133</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.315</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicod.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
